title: drymophila cyanocarpa
intro: Drymophila cyanocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as the blue-fruited tree or blue dracaena. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drymophila cyanocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments in herbal medicine.
